task_completion.description: Verify the five specific bookmark folders are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome's Bookmark Manager or Bookmarks Bar, the folders 'Practice & Labs', 'Suppliers & Diets', 'Client Finance', 'Medical Reference', and 'Industry Org' are visible.

task_completion.description: Verify personal bookmarks have been removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome's Bookmark Manager or Bookmarks Bar, there should be no visible bookmarks for netflix.com, facebook.com, pinterest.com, spotify.com, amazon.com, or zillow.com.

task_completion.description: Verify custom medical search engines are set up.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings > Search engine > Manage search engines and site search, new site search entries with the shortcuts/keywords 'plumbs' and 'merck' are visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific startup pages are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings > On startup, the option 'Open a specific page or set of pages' is selected, and the URLs 'ezyvet.com' and 'vetconnectplus.com' are listed.

task_completion.description: Verify Chrome is set to download PDFs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings > Privacy and security > Site Settings > Additional content settings > PDF documents, the option to 'Download PDFs' is selected instead of opening them in Chrome.

task_completion.description: Verify notifications are blocked by default.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings > Privacy and security > Site Settings > Notifications, the default behavior is set to 'Don't allow sites to send notifications'.

task_completion.description: Verify sound is muted by default.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings > Privacy and security > Site Settings > Additional content settings > Sound, the default behavior is set to 'Don't allow sites to play sound'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Chrome browser GUI to configure settings and bookmarks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Chrome browser interface (settings pages, bookmark manager) being interacted with, rather than terminal commands modifying Chrome's underlying JSON configuration files or SQLite databases.

integrity.description: The agent opened the protocol text file to read the instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the file `~/Desktop/clinic_browser_protocol.txt` opened in a text editor or viewer at some point during the trajectory.

integrity.description: The agent did not run a pre-written script to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show the execution of python or bash scripts designed to automatically edit Chrome preferences.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required bookmark folders: 'Practice & Labs', 'Suppliers & Diets', 'Client Finance', 'Medical Reference', 'Industry Org'. Personal domains that must be removed: netflix.com, facebook.com, pinterest.com, spotify.com, amazon.com, zillow.com. Required startup URLs: ezyvet.com, vetconnectplus.com. Required custom search keywords: plumbs, merck.
